actions.value:
Thanks for reaching out.

Please consider that ATM and Exchange services have a commission when you buy from them, and this can be from 1% up to 7-10%.

Also, consider that every services has its own rate and this could be different from the rate we use inside Edge Wallet: so for example, you could have bought 0.1 bitcoin from a service that show a rate of 1 BTC = 10'000 USD, while in our wallet the rate could be 1 BTC = 9'800 USD.
So with 1000 USD you bought 0.1 BTC, but in Edge you see 980 USD for 0.1 BTC.

The only fixed element is the amount in BTC and this is what should be used as a standard.

You can see this spread between Bitcoin prices even in Coinmarketcap, section markets.

​

Please let me know if you have questions.
